text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Shakur! Can you think of anything that
rhymes with peas?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The hell did that come from?
…And come on, you think I'd fall for that?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Aw, it didn't work. I've been trying to
figure out how to make you smile.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
…Someone of your royal standing shouldn't
be wasting their time trying to amuse me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But I know you actually smile a lot.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've seen it loads of times. When you solve a
difficult equation or look at data, you smile.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That… That's what people call a wicked smile.
It's not the kinda look you go out of your way
to try and see.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Really? It feels more like an accomplished
smile to me. And considering I've seen lots
of smiles from all around the world, I'd say
you can trust my opinion!♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I know, maybe you'll get pulled in if I start laughing. Here goes! Ahahahahaaa!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Did you seriously think that would work?!
Of all the…

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: …Sigh. Bring me a tough number puzzle first and then we can talk.
